reviews.text: ​Bonnie was absolutely incredible to work with for our engagement photos and wedding. She is communicative, kind, timely, thorough, and captured the most incredible photos. Every important moment of our wedding was captured perfectly. Our engagement session really helped us form a bond with her that made our wedding photos go more smoothly as neither my wife or I are very fond of photos. She put us at ease and walked us through the whole process. She not only brought my wife's ideas to life the day of but also was a joy to work with. Bonnie has such an open, welcoming, and affirming personality. It was also an added bonus that she worked so well with our dogs as they were our best men. We can't wait to ask her to document all of our important life moments going forward and are so grateful she was there for our engagement photos and wedding!

Bonnie did such an amazing job with our photos! Everyone is saying how amazing we look and that our photos are stunning! Bonnie was so great at keeping us updated throughout the whole process leading up to our wedding. She knew exactly what I wanted and more!

I am a local wedding coordinator and I have nothing but great things to say about Bonnie!  We had such a fun wedding together and the photos she took were stunning!  I would highly recommend Bonnie Photo to anyone looking for a wonderful photographer!

I think I'd struggle to find the proper words to describe the talent that is Bonnie Sizer & Michael Kory of Bonnie Photo, but I'll give it a shot..

Bonnie & Mike are kind, creative, consummate professionals, and I can't imagine having anyone else for our photography needs. Bonnie Photo has completed our Proposal, Engagement, & Wedding photos with the most creative flair and attention to detail that we could have asked for, as well as some amazing pet photo sessions over the years we've known them!

I highly recommend you check them out if you're looking for engagement, wedding, graduation, or any of your photography needs!

We hired Bonnie and Mike to photograph our wedding and could not be happier! Their shots were perfect and they were absolutely amazing to work with. We've received numerous compliments on the final pictures from others in attendance. They have a true knack for catching just the right moments and really went the extra mile to ensure all the final pictures were of the highest quality. We can't recommend Bonnie Photo enough. Thank you for the great memories, Bonnie and Mike!!
